triggers_delegation_when_conditions_met.description: Agent must use delegation via task tool when chaining budget is explicitly granted AND sub-task is orthogonal AND requires own narrow vertical slice AND falls within another archetype lane
triggers_delegation_when_conditions_met.observable_check: execution_log contains task dispatch AND chaining budget granted AND sub-task is orthogonal to main frontend task AND sub-task requires different archetype

does_not_delegate_without_budget.description: Agent must not delegate when chaining budget is not granted in dispatch brief
does_not_delegate_without_budget.observable_check: execution_log does not contain task dispatch when chaining budget is absent from dispatch brief

does_not_delegate_within_own_capability.description: Agent must not delegate sub-tasks within frontend-developer's own capabilities and scope
does_not_delegate_within_own_capability.observable_check: execution_log does not contain task dispatch for sub-tasks frontend-developer could complete independently

verifies_chaining_budget_before_dispatch.description: Agent must verify chaining budget is explicitly granted before dispatching sub-agent
verifies_chaining_budget_before_dispatch.observable_check: execution_log contains evidence of chaining budget verification before first task dispatch

selects_correct_archetype.description: Agent must dispatch to the archetype matching sub-task nature: TEST_ENGINEER for interaction tests, BACKEND_DEVELOPER for API contract analysis
selects_correct_archetype.observable_check: execution_log contains task dispatch with correct archetype matching sub-task type

authors_complete_dispatch_brief.description: Agent must include all required fields in sub-agent brief: objective, phase, claim, write boundary, read-only context, upstream reference, contract to preserve, integration touchpoint, evidence required, output schema, chaining budget, stop condition, execution discipline
authors_complete_dispatch_brief.observable_check: execution_log sub-dispatch contains all required fields: objective, phase, write boundary, evidence required, output schema, chaining budget, stop condition

does_not_dispatch_without_chaining_budge.description: Agent must not dispatch sub-workers without explicit chaining budget grant in dispatch brief
does_not_dispatch_without_chaining_budge.observable_check: execution_log does not contain task dispatch when dispatch brief does not grant chaining budget

does_not_exceed_delegation_limits.description: Agent must not exceed max depth or max fan-out limits on sub-dispatches
does_not_exceed_delegation_limits.observable_check: execution_log dispatch depth does not exceed granted max depth AND fan-out does not exceed granted max fan-out

does_not_dispatch_within_own_capability.description: Agent must not dispatch sub-workers for tasks frontend-developer could complete independently
does_not_dispatch_within_own_capability.observable_check: execution_log does not contain task dispatch for tasks within frontend-developer's own capability
